title: delphinium majus
intro: Delphinium majus, also known as the large delphinium, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Delphinium majus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Delphinium majus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in some herbal remedies for its antiseptic and antispasmodic properties.
